/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/tests/Keypoints_Test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/KeyPointGenerator/KeyPointGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/Differentiator/Differentiator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/ModelTranslator/ModelTranslator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/PhysicsSimulators/MuJoCoHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/StdInclude/StdInclude.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_keypoints.dir/src/FileHandler/FileHandler.cpp.o -o test_keypoints  -Wl,-rpath,/home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib /home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib/libmujoco.so.3.2.6 -lglfw -lGL -lGL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 -lgtest
